subject: Solo Live Act — RAV Vast + Live Looping | Summer Season 2026
body_html:
Dear Victoria,

I'm reaching out about summer 2026 placements at your partner hotels.

I'm FLUTUR — a solo live act specializing in ambient/sunset sessions with RAV Vast + live looping + acoustic guitar. My sound fills the space between background music and a full band: organic, atmospheric, and adaptable from cocktail hour to high-energy sets.

Credentials:

  • 4-year sunset residency at Villa Porta, Lake Maggiore (5-star boutique hotel)
  • Greece's Got Talent — 4 YES votes (national TV)
  • Main stage at Drishti Beats Festival (Aspen, Colorado)
  • RAV Vast Endorsed Artist
  • Collaboration with Equanimous (100M+ streams, Gravitas Recordings)

What I offer hotels:

  • Fully autonomous setup — no sound engineer needed
  • Flexible format: sunset ceremony, poolside ambient, cocktail energy, or full show
  • Available for full summer season or shorter residencies
  • Languages: English, Italian, Greek (basic), French

Video portfolio:

  • Sunset Session — RAV Vast on Anjunadeep (ambient/melodic)
  • Transcendence — RAV Vast Sound Journey (healing/meditative)
  • Efthymia — RAV Vast Meditation (spa/wellness)
  • Greece's Got Talent — Full Performance
  • Who Is Flutur — Artist Story (EPK)

I would love to discuss how my sound could complement your hotel entertainment programming for summer 2026. I'm available for a video call at your convenience.

Best regards,
Alessio "Flutur" Cazzaniga
linktr.ee/flutur
IG: @flutur.music
notes: This is NOT a cold venue email — it's an agency application
Include ALL videos (agencies need to see range)
Mention Greece's Got Talent prominently (local credibility for Greek market)
Highlight autonomy (no sound engineer = lower cost for hotels)
DO NOT mention specific rate — let them ask

follow_up_plan.if_no_reply_7_days: Follow up to Victoria Papadopoulou on LinkedIn
